target_cmd: curl -s https://www.solaceagi.com | wc -c && curl -s https://www.solaceagi.com | grep -c '<section'
target_name: Buddha Middle Path — Homepage Size and Section Count Balance
context: Buddha Middle Path oracle (q-agi-058): 'Suffering arises from excess or lack.' The homepage should follow the Middle Path: not too long (excess = suffering), not too short (lack = insufficient). Measure: total bytes (should be between 20KB-200KB for a focused landing page) and section count (should be 5-12 sections: enough to persuade, not too many to overwhelm). Output line 1: byte count. Line 2: section count. Buddha assesses the balance.
